# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Cyberpunk UX Overhaul with AI-Powered Troubleshooting
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's cyberpunk UI revamp and AI-assisted problem solving, highlighting the improved editor, Azure OpenAI guidance, and new authentication flow.
- Slug: codegrind-cyberpunk-ux-updates
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-cyberpunk-ux-updates
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-07-codegrind-cyberpunk-ux-updates.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind has refreshed its core DSA practice experience with a cyberpunk visual overhaul, a more capable AI assistant, and streamlined sign-in. This campaign highlights tangible UX improvements, real-time AI guidance, and a smoother onboarding flow to reinforce practice impact.
- CTA: Explore the refreshed CodeGrind experience and try a problem with AI-assisted hints today.
- Visual brief: Static hero image featuring CodeGrind UI in a neon cyberpunk aesthetic: updated three-panel layout (Problem Description, Code Editor, AI Chat) with glowing towers visualizing concepts, subtle GitHub/Google sign-in cues, and a prominent AI-help prompt.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
